_doc: Display anchor -> upstream source resolution (Phase B). RESOLVED* = anchor traces to a formula contract / kpi_source metric / Read-VERIFIED element-id->source bind (verified_anchor_binds.json). EXCLUDED_CHROME = a UI control/label/counter with no data provenance (excluded from the data denominator). NEEDS_JS_PARSE = data anchor not yet bound. resolved_pct is over DATA anchors (total - chrome) so it is honest, never chrome-inflated.

chain.name: Numeric adoption-risk score (0-100) for the hive, or '--' when no snapshot exists.
Live chips of workers currently online in the hive (Supabase Realtime presence).
Supervisor verdict headline summarizing hive health across logbook, PM scope, inventory and adoption risk
Count of all logbook entries by the current worker (welcome screen).
Count of CLOSED logbook entries by the current worker (welcome screen).
OEE quality % = good/total x 100 (capped 100)
Count caption 'Showing N of M entries' for the logbook feed
Distinct machine count in the header stat pills (worker's own entries)
Count of entries queued offline awaiting sync
Open-entries count in the header stat pills (head COUNT query)
Open-jobs badge ('N open job(s)') on the open-jobs panel
Inline PM-tasks header count ('N need(s) attention' / 'All tasks on track')
Total-entries count in the header stat pills (head COUNT query)
Total parts count pill — shows items.length, the number of inventory items in the current scope.
Pagination label 'Showing N of M parts' — visible.length / filtered.length of inventory items.
Plain-Read stock-health verdict headline (e.g. 'Stock is healthy', 'N parts out of stock') classifying inventory state.
Shows 'Showing N of M assets' — the count of visible vs. filtered PM assets.
Plain-read verdict headline (e.g. 'PM compliance is healthy (88%)', 'PM compliance is in the red') driven by SMRP 2.1.1 compliance %, overdue count, and total.
Plain-read reliability verdict ('need action' / 'climbing' / 'healthy' / 'not enough data') derived from OEE, worst-MTBF and PM-compliance.

source.reads: client-side exam grading (answers vs answer key)

chain.name: Exam result score (X / 10) after submitting a quiz
chain.reads: client-side exam grading (answers vs answer key)

chain.name: Skill-matrix verdict headline summarizing discipline progress vs targets
Mod-queue badge count = number of flagged posts
Live roster of teammates currently online
Current user's total community XP
Total count of published listings in the active section after filters, shown as the hero number on the 'total' summary card.
Width (and color) of the listing-quality progress bar in the Post form, driven by a 0-100 quality score computed live from the form fields.
Numeric listing-quality score shown as 'NN / 100' beside the quality bar in the Post form.
Plain-read verdict headline summarizing the listing population, e.g. 'N listings · M of them yours' / 'N {section} listings live'.
Seller's total PHP earned: sum of (price * 0.95, i.e. net of 5% platform fee) over orders with status 'released'.
Plain-Read verdict headline for the day plan (e.g. 'Day plan looks manageable', 'N items overdue', 'No plan yet').
Capacity bar whose width visualizes the count of open logbook items in the sidebar.
Text label '{N} open item(s) from Logbook' in the sidebar header.
Health band label (Healthy / Review / Action) derived from the composite score.
Composite platform health score (0-100) shown as the big number in the header ring.
Consecutive clean validator runs (0 FAIL, 0 regressions)
Plain-read project-health verdict headline (e.g. '3 active projects, none overdue' / 'N projects past end date')
Headline integrations verdict label (e.g. 'N integrations stale', 'N CMMS integrations healthy', 'No integrations configured yet')
Count of valid rows to import from the selected file
Verdict headline for the latest regional PH intelligence report (e.g. 'No regional data yet', 'Report is thin or aging', '5-plant report, 12d old').
Plain-Read verdict headline (e.g. 'Fleet risk is high' / 'Fleet is healthy')
MTBF/failure-trend caption text under the weekly failure bars
Total-level card: sum of current_level across all 12 achievement domains for the signed-in worker (max 1,200).
Hero tier badge label: worker's tier (e.g. 'Senior Technician') derived from their top achievement level.
Plain-Read verdict headline interpreting weekly XP / active-domain pace (e.g. 'NN XP this week — solid pace', 'No achievements yet').
Hero count of approved assets registered in this hive.
Asset hierarchy level (e.g. equipment) shown in the asset detail header.
P-F interval (days from potential-failure detection to functional failure) for the selected condition parameter.
Predicted days until failure for the asset (from the risk model).
Reliability-risk score shown as a percentage in the asset risk card.
Composed status verdict sentence (e.g. 'N assets tracked, M marked critical' / 'N submissions awaiting approval') for the asset fleet.
Count of pending (and rejected) asset submissions in the supervisor approval queue.
Count of open carry-forward items from the prior shift.
Count of low-stock parts to pre-stage for this shift.
Count of preventive-maintenance tasks due in this shift window.
Count of top-risk assets flagged for this shift window.
Overall shift-readiness verdict (e.g. 'Heavy shift - prioritize hot assets and carry-forward').
Top-5 Anomaly Engine signal-count badge (e.g. '5 signals'); the count is the size of the fused-anomaly list, not an aggregate
AMC daily-brief 'High Risk' stat tile — count of high-risk assets in today's brief
AMC daily-brief 'Crew' stat tile — count of crew alerts in today's brief
AMC daily-brief 'Parts' stat tile — count of parts at risk / to stage in today's brief
AMC daily-brief 'PMs Due' stat tile — count of PMs due in today's brief
Shows the count of journal entries currently displayed (e.g. '12 entries'), reflecting the active language filter + search.
Health-ring status label ('All clear' / 'Attention' / 'Action needed') derived from the validator pass %.
Validator pass percentage shown as the big number inside the health ring (e.g. "87%").
